title: A Six-Week Heat-Accumulation Window for Weekly EHEC Notifications in Korea, 2005-2024 — reproducible analysis code

creators.name: Kim, Seongdae
creators.affiliation: Hongik University; Korea University Graduate School

description: Reproducible R code (negative-binomial GAMM + distributed lag models, autocorrelation-adjusted with gamm()+corAR1) for the manuscript submitted to Environmental Health and Preventive Medicine. Reproduces the single-lag and cumulative-lag temperature estimates and all supplementary analyses.
